html_cleanup_patterns: Saved from AJ Investment Research on .*?https://\S+
analysis_notes: This is supporting context for X-thread analysis, not a live-trading alert feed.
Do not OCR images. Use only extracted article text and image alt text.
Be skeptical and conservative; feed language may be confident, vague, promotional, or stale.
Separate explicit actions from thesis language. Do not infer buy/sell action unless the article states it.
Flag stale context risk because these articles may be outdated relative to later X posts.
